ogTitle: Julimar vs Juna Downs: Climate Safety
ogDescription: Data-driven comparison of climate risk in Julimar and Juna Downs.
heading: Julimar vs Juna Downs — Which is Safer?
intro: Compare climate risk between Julimar, Western Australia and Juna Downs, Western Australia. Our analysis uses data from BOM, CSIRO, and state hazard authorities to score each suburb across 6 climate hazards.
verdict: Julimar has a lower overall climate risk score (30/100) compared to Juna Downs (31/100). We recommend getting an address-level report for properties in both suburbs before making a purchase decision.

faq.question: Is Julimar or Juna Downs safer from flooding?
faq.answer: Julimar has a flood risk score of 27/100, while Juna Downs scores 24/100. A lower score indicates lower flood risk. Get an address-level flood risk report for a specific property.

faq.question: Which suburb has lower bushfire risk?
faq.answer: Julimar scores 18/100 for bushfire risk. Juna Downs scores 48/100. Fire risk depends on proximity to vegetation and local fire history.

faq.question: Should I buy in Julimar or Juna Downs?
faq.answer: Both suburbs have climate considerations. Julimar has a lower overall climate risk score. We recommend getting a full ClimateNest report for any specific property you're considering, which includes 8 hazard scores, insurance projections, and actionable recommendations.

valueImpact.description: Properties in this area may face a 0.08% climate value drag over time due to rising insurance costs and climate adaptation expenses.
